definition: Demonstrates understanding of academic integrity rules, identifies violations (e.g., cheating, plagiarism), and explains appropriate responses that protect fairness and trust.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses integrity practices, plagiarism avoidance, or ethical conduct in academic contexts.

level_rubric.3: Multiple practices with fairness reasoning

definition: Recognizes privacy-sensitive information in educational contexts and proposes actions that reduce exposure, protect individuals, and comply with expected privacy norms.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact mentions handling personal data, anonymization, or privacy-preserving techniques.

level_rubric.2: Identifies privacy risks and proposes mitigations
level_rubric.3: Comprehensive privacy framework with concrete actions

definition: Ability to write, debug, and maintain Python programs for data processing, automation, and scientific computing.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact includes runnable Python code and demonstrates correct logic for the stated task.

level_rubric.3: Robust modules, tests, clear APIs

definition: Understands and applies machine learning algorithms, model training, evaluation, and deployment for predictive or analytical tasks.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses ML algorithms, model training, hyperparameter tuning, or evaluation metrics.

level_rubric.1: Mentions ML concepts at a surface level
level_rubric.2: Applies ML algorithms with proper evaluation
level_rubric.3: Designs end-to-end ML pipelines with optimization

definition: Designs, trains, and evaluates deep neural network architectures for complex learning tasks including classification, generation, and representation learning.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses neural network architectures, training procedures, loss functions, or deep learning frameworks.

level_rubric.1: Mentions neural networks or DL concepts
level_rubric.2: Implements and trains DL models with proper methodology
level_rubric.3: Designs novel architectures or advanced training strategies

definition: Collects, cleans, explores, and interprets data to extract meaningful insights and support decision-making.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact shows data wrangling, statistical analysis, visualization, or interpretation of findings.

level_rubric.3: Advanced analysis pipeline with actionable insights

definition: Applies computational techniques to analyze, understand, and generate human language, including tokenization, embeddings, and language models.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses text preprocessing, embeddings, transformers, or language model applications.

level_rubric.2: Implements NLP pipelines or uses pre-trained models
level_rubric.3: Fine-tunes or designs NLP systems for specific tasks

definition: Understands ethical implications of AI systems, identifies sources of bias, and applies techniques to ensure fairness, transparency, and accountability.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses fairness metrics, bias detection, debiasing techniques, or ethical frameworks for AI.

level_rubric.1: Mentions bias or fairness at surface level
level_rubric.2: Identifies bias sources and applies mitigation techniques
level_rubric.3: Comprehensive fairness framework with measurable outcomes

definition: Plans and executes research following systematic methodologies, including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, data collection, and analysis.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact describes research questions, methodology, experimental setup, or systematic analysis.

level_rubric.3: Rigorous experimental design with controls and validation

definition: Produces clear, structured, and well-organized technical documents that effectively communicate complex ideas to the intended audience.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact demonstrates structured writing with clear sections, logical flow, and proper citations.

level_rubric.3: Publication-quality writing with rigorous citations

definition: Creates and manages project plans with clear goals, timelines, milestones, and resource allocation to ensure successful project delivery.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact includes project plans, timelines, milestones, task breakdowns, or resource allocation.

level_rubric.2: Structured plan with milestones and timelines
level_rubric.3: Comprehensive plan with risk management and contingencies

definition: Analyzes information objectively, evaluates evidence, and forms well-reasoned conclusions through logical reasoning.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact shows analysis of alternatives, evaluation of trade-offs, or evidence-based reasoning.

level_rubric.3: Deep analysis with multi-perspective evaluation

definition: Applies statistical methods to analyze data, test hypotheses, and draw valid conclusions with appropriate confidence measures.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact uses statistical tests, regression, probability distributions, or confidence intervals.

level_rubric.3: Advanced statistical modeling with proper validation

definition: Understands and applies techniques for removing the influence of specific training data from machine learning models while preserving model utility.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses unlearning algorithms, data influence removal, or model retraining strategies for data deletion.

level_rubric.3: Implements unlearning pipeline with utility-privacy trade-off analysis

definition: Works effectively with others to achieve shared goals, communicating clearly, resolving conflicts, and contributing to team success.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact describes team interactions, role allocation, collaborative decision-making, or group outcomes.

level_rubric.3: Leads collaborative efforts with clear role coordination

definition: Effectively presents ideas, findings, or proposals to an audience using clear structure, engaging delivery, and appropriate visual aids.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact involves presentation materials, slide decks, or describes oral delivery.

level_rubric.3: Compelling delivery with audience engagement

definition: Applies software engineering principles to design, implement, test, and maintain software systems following best practices.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact shows code architecture, testing practices, version control, or software design patterns.

level_rubric.3: Engineered system with CI/CD and documentation

definition: Creates effective visual representations of data that communicate patterns, trends, and insights clearly to diverse audiences.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact includes charts, plots, dashboards, or visual data representations.

level_rubric.3: Interactive or publication-quality visualizations

definition: Uses cloud platforms and services for deploying, scaling, and managing applications and data processing workloads.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact discusses cloud services, deployment strategies, or distributed computing.

level_rubric.3: Architects scalable cloud solutions

definition: Designs, queries, and manages databases to store and retrieve data efficiently and reliably.
evidence_rules: Counts as evidence when the artifact includes SQL queries, schema design, or database optimization discussions.

level_rubric.3: Performance-optimized database architecture
